title: stdin_request
description: Announces the kernel is blocking on user input. The host responds out-of-band (a dedicated stdin channel; the events stream is one-way). request_id allows the host to correlate the eventual response.

prompt.description: Text to display in the host's input UI.

kind.description: What kind of input the kernel wants. string = read_string-style; expression = Maxima expression; debugger_command = dbm prompt.
